DisplayName.value: Flatlander's Fixes and Tweaks for the IGP

Description.value: The [FFB400]Flatlander's Fixes and Tweaks for the IGP[-] mod provides fixes, tweaks and enhancements for the IZY-All in One Gun Pack (IGP) v2.6.5.1.3 released on 2026-04-14 on Nexus Mods. Several optional enhancements, including the 'No Kick' option, are managed exclusively through the Gears mod interface. In order to access these optional enhancements, you must install the Gears mod and the Quartz mod.
